subject: Two humanoid figures depicted together: a larger imposing figure looming behind a smaller foreground figure who wears a gold crown or control ring on the head
suspected_ip: Broly and Paragus (Dragon Ball Z, Movie 8)
description: The card depicts two figures in a narrative composition. The foreground figure has dark long hair and wears a visible gold crown or headband-style ring — the control artifact central to the card's theme. A taller, larger figure stands behind and slightly above, looming with visible bulk and presence. The visual relationship clearly communicates control and domination: the wearer of the ring in front, the controlling party behind. The background features green-yellow energy and bright lighting effects. The composition is a mid-shot capturing both figures in a tight vertical frame.
foreground: Dark-haired figure wearing gold control crown/ring, with larger figure looming behind
background: Green-yellow energy effects and bright lighting
